pass_2_evaluation.rationale: KSA AB-S-010 (Core Abilities) scores 0.432 composite (signal: weak). Scope fit for Cloud Data Architect: edge_case. Preliminary decision: include.

pass_3_adversarial_internal.ruling: No inconsistency. Edge-case scope, score 0.432 meets threshold. Decision stands.

pass_4_adversarial_external.challenge: Does market evidence support Core Abilities KSA AB-S-010 as a discrete competency for Cloud Data Architect?
pass_4_adversarial_external.evidence: Reviewed against Cloud Data Architect market data. General ability without cloud architecture-specific grounding. Score 0.432 with no role-specific keyword match confirms exclusion.
pass_4_adversarial_external.ruling: Revised to exclude. General ability without cloud architecture-specific grounding. Final decision: exclude.

decision_rationale: Pass 4 overturn: General ability without cloud architecture-specific grounding.
